Case# CWErr.cwCipherSuiteRejectedErr

macOS 10.6+

```
case cwCipherSuiteRejectedErr
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/corewlan/cwerr/cwciphersuiterejectederr#Discussion)

Cipher suite rejected due to network security policy.
